title: CQP - Email to the Broker English
description: Email to the Broker English Screen

config.content:
To: From previous screen

CC: Multiple selected, from previous screen

Subject: from previous screen

 

Body:

Dear {{Email name}},

I hope this message finds you well.

Following the information provided and based on our analysis, I am pleased to share with you the quotation for the referenced risk, wich is attached to this email.

Bellow is a summary of the main terms and conditions of our offer:

    - Offered Support: [Percentage]% for [percentage]% direct participation            
    - Market Dsitribution: [Deatils, if applicable]. For example:

            - Munchener Ruckversicherungs Gesellschaft - 12.50% p/d 100% Line to stand
            - Scor Reinsurance Company - 6.25% p/d 100% Line to stand
            - Austral Re - 3.13% p/d 100% Line to stand
            - Echo RE - 3.13% p/d 100% Line to stand

    - Additional Conditions: [Specify or list]. If not applicable, please indicate N/A.
    - Quote Subject to: [Specify]. Please list any subjectivities that cannot be included in the slip. Each risk is unique and may require                  different conditions -- this section should be completed accordingly.
    - Validity of the Quote: 15 calendar days frm the date of this email.

Important Note: Reinsurers shall not be considered on risk until formal confirmation of film order is received. They reserve the right to adjust the offered terms if there are changes in the risk or in the loss history information prior to such confirmation. 

We remain at your disposal for any comments or additional information you may need to proceed.

Kind regards,


Jhoana Romero Salgado | Senior Cargo Underwritter
Mobile +57 314 337 9641
jromero@forteuw.com | www.forteunderwriters.com
